name: New regulation

title: "[reg] <name>"
labels: new-regulation

**Regulation name:**
**Body / regulator:**
**Jurisdiction:** Global / EU / US / UK / FR / SG / Other
**Regime type:** hard_law / supervisory / voluntary / consultation / analytical
**Status:** in_force / proposed / provisional / consultation / withdrawn / final_guidance
**Source URL(s):**
**Which AI register field groups does it drive?** (subset of A-H, or none)
**Key dates / deadlines:**
**One-paragraph summary (your own words - do not paste source text):**

Once filled in, create `data/regulations/<slug>.yaml` and open a PR. CI will validate it.
